title: The 50/30/20 Rule
description: Allocate 50% to needs, 30% to wants, and 20% to savings for a truly balanced financial life.

title: Track Every Expense
description: Record all transactions — even small ones. Daily coffee expenses add up to surprisingly large totals by month end.

title: Build an Emergency Fund
description: Set aside 3–6 months of living expenses in a liquid account to protect yourself from unexpected shocks.

title: Automate Your Savings
description: Set up automatic transfers on payday. 'Pay yourself first' ensures consistent savings before lifestyle spending.

title: Cut Subscription Bloat
description: Audit recurring subscriptions quarterly. Most people forget services they barely use — cancelling frees real cash.

title: Review Monthly Reports
description: Spending patterns reveal habits. Monthly reviews help you spot problem areas before they become serious issues.
